prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to recruiting governors and academy trustees within England primarily, as it references specific services and initiatives associated with the Department for Education (DfE) and does not mention any distinct regulations or frameworks applicable to Scotland.
